title: Senior Software Engineer - CDAC - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - CDAC - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CDAC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About CDAC:
CDAC is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDAC!
